Validation began after task-1 produced the local Astro React Islands website candidate. Evidence sources: npm install/build, mdkg validate, Browser desktop/mobile screenshots, Chrome desktop/mobile screenshots, noindex metadata, and preview-gated public copy.

Validation passed locally. npm install completed with 0 vulnerabilities; npm run build passed with upstream Vite/React deprecation warnings only; mdkg validate --json returned ok true with zero warnings; Browser desktop/mobile checks showed h1, hero visual, nav, interaction hash, no horizontal overflow, and no console logs; Chrome screenshots confirm desktop/mobile responsive rendering and React Island interaction. Site includes noindex,nofollow and public copy keeps Vercel preview, DNS, push, tag, publish, analytics, and durable hosting approval-gated. Recommendation: request parent workflow approval for a Vercel preview if desired; otherwise keep as a local demo candidate.
